posts.title: AI News Roundup — June 6, 2026: Great American AI Act, ChatGPT Dreaming V3, Anthropic IPO, SpaceX Record Debut, and NVIDIA Reinvents the PC
posts.excerpt: A 269-page federal AI bill lands in Congress. ChatGPT gets a memory revolution with Dreaming V3. Anthropic confidentially files for IPO. SpaceX targets a $75B record. NVIDIA launches RTX Spark. Microsoft builds 7 models without OpenAI.

posts.title: AI News Roundup — June 5, 2026: D.C. Circuit Grills Pentagon in Anthropic Showdown, Canada Bets $200B on Sovereign AI, Chai Discovery Chases $3.4B Valuation, and Cognizant Hosts AI Forum
posts.excerpt: D.C. Circuit judges call the Pentagon's Anthropic blacklisting 'spectacular overreach.' Canada launches a $200B sovereign AI strategy with a public supercomputer. Chai Discovery is in talks to raise $400M at a $3.4B valuation. Cognizant brings enterprise leaders together at its AI Forum.

posts.title: AI News Roundup — June 4, 2026: xAI Restructures After SpaceX Merger, Google's $2.4B Windsurf Coup, SoftBank Bets $87B on France, and MiniMax M3 Enters the Ring
posts.excerpt: Elon Musk restructures xAI into four units after the SpaceX merger. Google swoops in on Windsurf for $2.4B, snatching it from OpenAI. SoftBank commits $87.3B to French AI data centers. MiniMax launches M3, an open-weight model claiming frontier coding performance.

posts.title: AI News Roundup — June 3, 2026: Trump's AI Executive Order, Microsoft Build Goes All-In on Agents, and Alphabet's $80B AI Bet
posts.excerpt: Trump signs a voluntary AI review executive order. Microsoft Build 2026 turns Windows into an AI agent platform. Alphabet raises $80 billion for AI infrastructure. Here's everything happening in AI this week.

posts.title: Understanding BlockingQueue in Java: A System Design Primitive

posts.title: The Meaning of Onkar
posts.excerpt: The name Onkar is derived from the Sanskrit word Omkar — the embodiment of the sacred sound Om. It represents ultimate reality, universal consciousness, and the origin of existence.
